manifest.name: Count Occurrence

name: Count Occurrence

releases.author: rohitrai3
releases.description:
# Fix
[\[1\]](https://github.com/rohitrai3/Obsidian-CountOccurrence/blob/5ef0d5200f3e0f9eba77b77075633d7df663ef7e/main.ts#L8-L8)
Promises must be awaited, end with a call to .catch, end with a call to .then with a rejection handler or be explicitly marked as ignored with the `void` operator.

[\[1\]](https://github.com/rohitrai3/Obsidian-CountOccurrence/blob/5ef0d5200f3e0f9eba77b77075633d7df663ef7e/main.ts#L21-L21)
Optional chain expressions can return undefined by design - using a non-null assertion is unsafe and wrong.
